prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-COUNTERFEITPEN-BLK-AMZ
Product Type: OFFICE_PRODUCTS
Brand (from catalog): ASR Federal
Existing Title: ASR Federal Counterfeit Currency Money Detector Pen, Fake Bill Checker for US Dollar and International Currency Quick Detection for Retail Cashiers Small Business Bank Tellers
Description: Our counterfeit money detector pen will provide results within seconds, and the mark will fade completely within a few hours.
</br></br>
Protect your business, cash flow, and peace of mind with the ASR Federal Counterfeit Money Detector Pen. Designed for fast and reliable verification, this compact tool uses iodine-based ink to help identify potentially counterfeit banknotes within seconds. Whether you're running a retail store, managing a restaurant, or handling cash transactions daily, this pen provides an easy and cost-effective solution to reduce fraud risk.
</br></br>
The detection process is simple and effective. When applied to a banknote, the ink reacts with starch commonly found in standard printer or copier paper used by counterfeiters. Genuine currency, typically printed on cotton-based paper, will show a light yellow or nearly invisible mark. Suspicious bills will produce a darker mark, signaling the need for further inspection.
</br></br>
This counterfeit detection pen is suitable for use with US dollars as well as many international currencies, making it a practical tool for businesses, travelers, and professionals handling global transactions. The fast-drying ink fades over time, leaving no lasting marks on verified bills.
</br></br>Compact, lightweight, and easy to carry, the ASR Federal detector pen is perfect for keeping at registers, in aprons, or on the go. It requires no batteries, no setup, and no expensive equipment, making it one of the most efficient ways to safeguard your business against counterfeit losses.
Search Terms: counterfeit pen money detector fake bill checker currency tester cash verification pen retail anti fraud tool bank teller supplies cashier tools counterfeit detection marker usd euro pound yen cash handling security office supply
Features:
- FAST RESULTS IN SECONDS: Instantly verify bills with iodine-based ink that reacts to starch in fake currency, helping you detect counterfeit money quickly at the point of sale
- CLEAR AND SIMPLE RESULTS: Marks appear light yellow or clear on genuine bills and dark on suspicious notes, giving you an easy visual indicator without guesswork
- FOR ALL BUSINESSES HANDLING CASH: For retail stores, restaurants, small businesses, banks, and vendors looking to reduce fraud risk and protect daily cash transactions
- WORKS ON USa AND INTERNATIONAL CURRENCY: Compatible with a wide range of global banknotes including USD, Euro, Pound, Yen, and more, making it useful for travel and international commerce
- PORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: Compact pen design fits in pockets, aprons, or cash registers, allowing fast and convenient checks anywhere without batteries or equipment

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Federal Counterfeit Currency Money Detector Pen Black

openai.item_name: ASR Federal Black Counterfeit Currency Money Detector Pen

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fast Results In Seconds, Works On US And International Currency, No Batteries Required, Portable Cashier Tool

openai.title_differentiation: Fast Iodine-Based Ink, Detects Fake Bills In Seconds, Works On US And International Currency, No Batteries
